signal: feed-broadcast 串台: SKILL.md delegated delivery target to Cron prompt but Cron had no target specified. Stale sessionKey bound to archived thread caused model to infer wrong target.
action: Grounded 'delivery delegation must be explicit at both ends' guardrail in memory/reference/skill-architecture.md. Human already fixed the routing (explicit targets in prompt, sessionKey rebound, 9 stale keys cleaned).
